issue-25519/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release target from Java 11 to Java 17.
issue-25519/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; compiling with release 11 would produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or fail if Java 17 specific features are used.

issue-25519/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Surefire plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Add explicit dependency for Jakarta WS RS API 3.1.0.
issue-25519/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Quarkus 3 (implied by the recipe context) require Jakarta EE 9+ APIs. The previous implicit or older version of JAX-RS is no longer sufficient or compatible.

issue-25519/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 17.
issue-25519/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin configuration aligns with the property change, guaranteeing Java 17 bytecode generation.

issue-25519/src/main/java/org/acme/Greet.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS annotations from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
issue-25519/src/main/java/org/acme/Greet.why_exists: javax.ws.rs classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile with 'package javax.ws.rs does not exist' errors.

issue-25519/src/main/java/org/acme/User..general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
issue-25519/src/main/java/org/acme/User..why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / Quarkus 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

issue-25519/src/main/java/org/acme/User..general_idea: Migrate JPA table annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
issue-25519/src/main/java/org/acme/User..why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / Quarkus 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.
